CustomField.description: This field is created for NPS Case escalation
CustomField.formula: CASE( WEEKDAY( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) ), 1, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 2, /* Sun -> Tue */ 2, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 2, /* Mon -> Wed */ 3, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 2, /* Tue -> Thu */ 4, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 2, /* Wed -> Fri */ 5, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 4, /* Thu -> Mon */ 6, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 4, /* Fri -> Tue */ 7, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 3, /* Sat -> Tue */ DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) + 2 )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is created for NPS Case escalation
CustomField.label: Fire After 2 business days
